alternative_parents.description: Inorganic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
alternative_parents.name: Inorganic salts

alternative_parents.description: Inorganic compounds containing a carbon atom combined with one or more elements of similar or lower electronegativity.
alternative_parents.name: Carbides

class.description: Inorganic halogenic compounds in which the heaviest metal atom is an alkaline earth metal.
class.name: Alkaline earth metal salts

description: This compound belongs to the class of inorganic compounds known as alkaline earth metal bromides. These are inorganic compounds in which the largest halogen atom is Bromine, and the heaviest metal atom a lanthanide.

direct_parent.description: Inorganic compounds in which the largest halogen atom is Bromine, and the heaviest metal atom a lanthanide.
direct_parent.name: Alkaline earth metal bromides

kingdom.description: Compounds that do not contain a C atom. Exceptions are made for isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon trioxide, carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Inorganic compounds

subclass.description: Inorganic compounds in which the largest halogen atom is Bromine, and the heaviest metal atom a lanthanide.
subclass.name: Alkaline earth metal bromides

superclass.description: Compounds that contains both metal and non metal atoms.
superclass.name: Mixed metal/non-metal compounds
